Misconfigurations.Title: 'apt-get' missing '--no-install-recommends'
Misconfigurations.Description: 'apt-get' install should use '--no-install-recommends' to minimize image size.
Misconfigurations.Message: '--no-install-recommends' flag is missed: 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y         libudev-dev         pkg-config     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*'

Misconfigurations.Title: 'apt-get' missing '--no-install-recommends'
Misconfigurations.Description: 'apt-get' install should use '--no-install-recommends' to minimize image size.
Misconfigurations.Message: '--no-install-recommends' flag is missed: 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y     ca-certificates     curl     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*'
